promptDef.name: search-models-used-in-components-and-ui-states
promptDef.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

assessments.name: Recall
assessments.description: Measures how many expected nodes were found in the final answer.

assessments.name: Precision
assessments.description: Measures how many returned nodes in the final answer are correct.

summary.prompt:
Find model declarations that are used by both Angular components and UI states.

Output it in this format:

Model - filePath

input.cypher: MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration) WHERE c.name =~ '.*([Ss]tate|UiState).*' RETURN c.id, c.name, c.filePath LIMIT 50

MATCH (component:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (component)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(compProp:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (compProp)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
OPTIONAL MATCH (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(modelDec:Decorator)
WHERE modelDec IS NULL
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(uiProp:PropertyDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.ui-state.ts'
MATCH (uiProp)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
OPTIONAL MATCH (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(modelDec:Decorator)
WHERE modelDec IS NULL
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (uiState:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(uiProp:PropertyDeclaration)
WHERE uiState.filePath CONTAINS '.ui-state.ts'
MATCH (uiProp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
OPTIONAL MATCH (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(modelDec:Decorator)
WHERE modelDec IS NULL
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 500

MATCH (component:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(compId:Identifier {text: 'Component'})
MATCH (compId)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (component)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(compProp:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (compProp)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(model:InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
OPTIONAL MATCH (model)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(modelDec:Decorator)
WHERE modelDec IS NULL
RETURN DISTINCT model.id, model.name, model.filePath
LIMIT 500
